response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in C++ and SQL from roles like National Instruments, but lacks direct Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain experience. Their recent work is heavily skewed toward Node.js, TypeScript, and other modern web technologies, with no recent C++ work on Windows platforms. The resume does not demonstrate Summit platform experience or fixed-income derivatives expertise, which are key requirements.
strengths: Strong C++ background with prior experience (e.g., National Instruments role)
Proficient in SQL with experience in databases like MySQL and MongoDB
Demonstrated expertise in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
concerns: No recent C++ development on Windows platforms (last C++ role was 9 years ago)
Lacks Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise or Summit platform experience
Recent work heavily focused on Node.js/TypeScript, not aligned with the role's technical stack
